title: Dancers with Jock Itch: 9 Herbal Tinctures to the Rescue
description: Aloe vera tinctures have been used to help treat jock itch due to its anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties. The gel of the aloe vera plant contains compounds like aloin, aloe-emodin, and acemannan, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce redness and swelling, and prevent the growth of fungal infections. When you apply aloe vera tincture to the affected area, it helps to break down the fungal cell walls, killing the infection and promoting healing. To use aloe vera t...
